feed.title: Ross Prendergast
feed.subtitle: Ross Prendergast's personal website and blog covering information security research, music production, politics and art.

entry.title: Vulnerability Management in 4 Stages
entry.summary: What is Vulnerability Management? Well, running a periodic Nessus scan on some of your organisation’s stuff ain’t it. Thats because it’s a full lifecycle of tools, team collaboration and processes, including: Periodic/continuous scanning of all your organisation’s assets, using various tools Informed measurement and prioritisation of findings from these tools The remediation of th...

entry.title: InfoSec Risk Management - Benefits & Common Pitfalls

link.title: InfoSec Risk Management - Benefits & Common Pitfalls

entry.summary: How Information Security (InfoSec) Risk Management can practically improve the security posture of your organisation if implemented correctly. Introduction The purpose of this article is to clearly describe how InfoSec Risk Management can tangibly improve the security posture of your organisation while outlining some common pitfalls and mistakes. TL;DR Risk Management provides methodolog...

entry.title: Welcome to Ross-Sec-Audio
entry.summary: Introduction to this site and the blog. Hey there! I’ve created this site to learn and to showcase the silly things I’ve written and developed. I don’t claim to be an expert on any topics covered here, so if I’ve made an error or misunderstood something, please do let me know. I’d be happy to update posts as required. I’m using this site to improve my understanding of InfoSec, Music Pr...
